title: CapabilityPack
description: A curated SourceOS/SociOS product capability bundle. CapabilityPack composes one or more SkillManifest entries, connector action scopes, permission requirements, expected artifacts, and receipt requirements into a user-visible onboarding/catalog unit.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, for example 2.0.0.

name.description: Human-readable pack name shown in onboarding, catalog, project, and automation surfaces.

version.description: SemVer version for this capability-pack declaration.

description.description: Short explanation of the workflow this pack enables.

trustLevel.description: Supply-chain trust tier for catalog filtering.

signatureRequired.description: Whether signed pack manifests are required before activation.

signatureRef.description: Optional signature, attestation, or verification reference.

sourceRef.description: Optional repository, package, or catalog source reference.

publisher.description: Publisher, source, and signing posture for the capability pack.

category.description: Catalog category used for filtering and onboarding recommendations.

lifecycle.description: Review and publication lifecycle of this pack.

skillRefs.description: SkillManifest URNs composed by this pack.

requiredConnectorActionScopeRefs.description: Connector action scopes required or requested by this pack.

requiredPermissionRefs.description: Canonical permission identifiers required by this pack, such as filesystem.read, artifact.write, github.pr.read, or command.run.scoped.

compatibleTrustModeRefs.description: Trust modes under which this pack is allowed to run by default.

forbiddenTrustModeRefs.description: Trust modes under which this pack must not run.

riskLevel.description: Risk tier shown in UI and used by policy gates.

allowedLicenses.description: Licenses explicitly allowed by this pack policy.

forbiddenLicenses.description: Licenses explicitly forbidden by this pack policy.

sbomRef.description: Optional SBOM or dependency inventory reference.

licensePolicy.description: License and dependency posture for supply-chain review.

supportsDryRun.description: Whether the pack can run without side effects.

supportsDraftOnly.description: Whether the pack can produce drafts instead of applying changes.

supportsApply.description: Whether the pack can apply changes when policy permits.

defaultMode.description: Default execution mode when a session activates this pack.

executionModes.description: Side-effect posture exposed to onboarding and review surfaces.

kind.description: Output kind, for example report, receipt, patch, pullRequestDraft, manifest, or review.

name.description: Expected artifact name or relative path.

required.description: Whether this artifact is required for a successful run.

contentHashRequired.description: Whether the artifact must carry or be accompanied by a content hash.

artifactOutputs.description: Artifacts this pack is expected to create.

receiptRequired.description: Whether sessions using this pack must emit a receipt.

revocable.description: Whether the pack can be disabled after activation.

revokeDeletesLocalIndex.description: Whether revocation deletes local indexes/caches created by this pack.

revokeDisablesAutomations.description: Whether revocation disables automations depending on this pack.

revocation.description: How disabling this capability pack affects local indexes, scheduled work, and future tool activation.

policyRefs.description: Policies governing activation, execution, and revocation of this pack.
